Operation 'uploadToIpfs' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects, not_actionable, poor_ai_interpretability. Original summary and description are extremely vague and lack actionable details. The description doesn't explain what inputs are expected (file data format), what is returned (IPFS hash/CID), or the side effects (permanent storage). Added specificity about IPFS content hashing, authentication requirement, return values, and permanence of uploads to help AI agents understand when and how to use this operation for NFT project asset management.

data.summary_suggestion: Upload file to IPFS and retrieve content hash
data.description_suggestion: Uploads a file to the InterPlanetary File System (IPFS) and returns the content hash (CID) for retrieval. Accepts file data in the request body. The uploaded file becomes permanently accessible via the returned IPFS hash. Requires API key authentication via path parameter. Returns the IPFS content identifier and file metadata.
data.reasoning: Original summary and description are extremely vague and lack actionable details. The description doesn't explain what inputs are expected (file data format), what is returned (IPFS hash/CID), or the side effects (permanent storage). Added specificity about IPFS content hashing, authentication requirement, return values, and permanence of uploads to help AI agents understand when and how to use this operation for NFT project asset management.

message: Operation 'createProject' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Original description is too minimal. Added clarity about what project configuration is expected, what is returned (project ID), and side effects (project becomes available for use). This helps AI agents understand the operation's full scope and when to use it.

data.description_suggestion: Creates a new NFT project for managing NFT collections and sales. Accepts project configuration details in the request body (e.g., project name, description, settings). Returns the created project object with a unique project ID and initial configuration. The project is immediately available for NFT management operations.
data.reasoning: Original description is too minimal. Added clarity about what project configuration is expected, what is returned (project ID), and side effects (project becomes available for use). This helps AI agents understand the operation's full scope and when to use it.

message: Operation 'reserveNftAndGetPaymentAddress' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Summary is clear. Description lacks critical details about parameters, return values, and reservation behavior. Enhanced to explain parameter purposes, what is returned, and the state change (NFT becomes reserved with expiration), enabling AI agents to understand the full transaction flow.

data.current_summary: Reserve NFT and Get Payment Address
data.current_description: Reserve an NFT and get a payment address for the sale.
data.description_suggestion: Reserves an NFT for purchase and generates a unique payment address for the transaction. Requires the NFT UID, payment gateway type, and customer IP address. Returns a payment address and reservation details with an expiration time. The NFT is held in reserved state until payment is received or the reservation expires. Payment gateway determines the address format (e.g., Cardano address for ADA payments).
data.reasoning: Summary is clear. Description lacks critical details about parameters, return values, and reservation behavior. Enhanced to explain parameter purposes, what is returned, and the state change (NFT becomes reserved with expiration), enabling AI agents to understand the full transaction flow.

data.current_description: Check the status of a payment address.
data.description_suggestion: Checks the current status of a reserved payment address. Returns status information including whether payment has been received, reservation expiration time, associated NFT details, and payment amount. Possible statuses include pending, paid, expired, or cancelled.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear and action-oriented. Description is too vague about what status information is returned. Enhanced to specify the types of status values and details returned, helping AI agents understand what information they can retrieve.

message: Operation 'cancelAddressReservation' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Summary is clear. Description lacks detail about what happens to the NFT and what is returned. Enhanced to clarify the side effect (NFT released back to inventory) and return values, helping AI agents understand the full impact of this operation.

data.current_description: Cancel a previously reserved payment address.
data.description_suggestion: Cancels a previously reserved payment address and releases the associated NFT back to available inventory. Returns confirmation of cancellation including the address, associated NFT UID, and cancellation timestamp. The NFT is no longer held in reserved state and becomes available for new reservations.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear. Description lacks detail about what happens to the NFT and what is returned. Enhanced to clarify the side effect (NFT released back to inventory) and return values, helping AI agents understand the full impact of this operation.
